home.title: CLAOJ - Online Judge
home.description: Welcome to CLAOJ - Modern competitive programming platform with contests, problems, and community.

problems.title: Problems - CLAOJ
problems.description: Browse and solve competitive programming problems. From beginner to advanced, find problems matching your skill level.

problem.description: {code}: {name} - {points} points, {acRate}% acceptance rate. Solve this competitive programming problem on CLAOJ.

contests.title: Contests - CLAOJ
contests.description: Participate in competitive programming contests. Join ongoing contests, practice with past contests, and improve your rating.

users.title: Users - CLAOJ
users.description: Browse competitive programmers profiles on CLAOJ.

user.title: Profile
user.description: {username} - {rating} rating, Rank #{rank}. View profile and submissions on CLAOJ.

ratings.title: Rating Leaderboard - CLAOJ
ratings.description: Top competitive programmers ranked by Elo-MMR rating. See who leads the CLAOJ community.

blog.title: Blog - CLAOJ
blog.description: Read insights, tutorials, and updates from the CLAOJ team and community.

submissions.title: Submissions - CLAOJ
submissions.description: View recent code submissions and solutions from the CLAOJ community.

stats.title: Statistics - CLAOJ
stats.description: View CLAOJ platform statistics including user counts, submission stats, and more.

organizations.title: Organizations - CLAOJ
organizations.description: Browse organizations and schools on CLAOJ.

Contest.title: Contests
Contest.noScheduled: There are no scheduled contests at this time.

Submissions.notAllowed: You do not have permission to rejudge.

Auth.loginDesc: Sign in to your CLAOJ account
Auth.verifyingDesc: Please wait while we verify your email address.
Auth.invalidEmailError: Please enter a valid email address
Auth.resendEmailSentDesc: If the email address exists and is not verified, a verification link has been sent. Please check your inbox and spam folder.
Auth.resendVerificationDesc: Enter your email address and we'll send you a new verification link.
Auth.totpDesc: Enter your TOTP code to continue
Auth.passkeyDesc: Use your passkey to sign in
Auth.totpInstructions: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app

Comments.title: Comments
Comments.noComments: No comments yet. Be the first to comment!
Comments.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this comment? This action will soft delete the comment.
Comments.editCommentDesc: Edit your comment. A revision history entry will be created.
Comments.viewAllEditsDesc: View all edits made to this comment

editorialComments.title: Editorial Comments
editorialComments.noComments: No comments yet. Be the first to discuss this editorial!
editorialComments.guidelines: Keep discussions focused on the editorial solution approach.

problemComments.title: Problem Comments
problemComments.placeholder: Ask questions or discuss this problem...
problemComments.noComments: No comments yet. Be the first to comment!
problemComments.guidelines: Please keep discussions respectful and on-topic.

Ratings.title: Rating Leaderboard
Ratings.description: Top competitive programmers ranked by Elo-MMR rating

problem.editorial_not_found: No editorial available for this problem
problem.editorial_not_public: This editorial is not yet public

admin.solution_summary_placeholder: Brief summary of the solution approach...
admin.solution_content_help: Write your solution in Markdown format. LaTeX math is supported using $...$ for inline math and $$...$$ for display math.
admin.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this solution? This action cannot be undone.
admin.make_public: Make answer public (visible to all contestants)
admin.clarification_question_placeholder: Enter your question about a problem...

stats.title: Site Statistics
stats.view_ranking: View the full ranking on the scoreboard page.

Ticket.title: Support Tickets
Ticket.subject: Subject
Ticket.searchProblemPlaceholder: Search for a problem (e.g., P01, APB)
Ticket.messagePlaceholder: Describe your issue in detail. Include steps to reproduce, expected behavior, and any relevant information.
Ticket.noMoreReplies: No further replies can be added
Ticket.notFoundDesc: The ticket you're looking for doesn't exist or has been removed.
Ticket.createDescription: Describe your issue and we'll get back to you.
Ticket.subtitle: Get help from the CLAOJ team.
Ticket.noTicketsDescription: Create a new ticket to get help from the team.

Settings.title: Settings
Settings.subtitle: Manage your profile and account settings.
Settings.newPasswordMinLength: New password must be at least 6 characters
Settings.emailNotVerifiedDesc: Please verify your email address to access all features. Check your inbox for the verification link, or resend the email below.
Settings.twoFactorDesc: Add an extra layer of security to your account by enabling two-factor authentication.
Settings.scanQrCode: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app
Settings.saveBackupCodesWarning: Save these backup codes in a safe place. Each code can only be used once.
Settings.deleteAccountWarning: Once you delete your account, there is no going back. This action is permanent and irreversible.
Settings.webauthnNotEnabled: WebAuthn is not enabled on your account. Register a credential to enable passwordless login.
Settings.enterCredentialNameAndPassword: Please enter a credential name and password
Settings.enterPasswordConfirmDeletion: Enter your password to confirm deletion:

Notification.title: Notifications
Notification.subtitle: Stay updated with your submissions, contests, and more.
Notification.emptyStateAll: You don't have any notifications yet. We'll notify you when something happens.
Notification.emptyStateFiltered: You don't have any {filter} notifications yet. We'll notify you when something happens.

AdminGroups.title: Groups & Permissions
AdminGroups.subtitle: Groups are shared with the Django site — changes apply to both.
AdminGroups.confirmDelete: Delete group "{name}"? Members lose its permissions.

dashboard.title: Admin Dashboard
dashboard.problemsDesc: Manage problem library, create new problems, and organize problem groups.
dashboard.contestsDesc: Create and manage contests, set up ratings, and monitor participation.
dashboard.usersDesc: Manage user accounts, ban/unban users, and assign roles.
dashboard.submissionsDesc: Monitor submission queue, rejudge submissions, and view statistics.
dashboard.blogDesc: Create, edit, and manage blog posts and announcements.
dashboard.ticketsDesc: Handle user support tickets, bug reports, and feature requests.
dashboard.languagesDesc: Configure supported programming languages and their settings.
dashboard.navigationDesc: Customize navigation bars and menu structure.
dashboard.groupsDesc: Manage user groups, permissions, and access control.

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Manage all users and their accounts

contests.title: Contests
contests.subtitle: Manage contests and their settings
contests.copyProblemsDesc: Copy all problems with their order and points
contests.copySettingsDesc: Copy authors, curators, testers, and organizations
contests.createSubtitle: Create a new contest with problems and settings
contests.submissionLockDesc: Lock submissions after a specific time. Once locked, users cannot submit to this contest.
contests.noParticipationsDesc: No users have joined this contest yet

contestTags.title: Contest Tags
contestTags.subtitle: Manage contest categorization tags
contestTags.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete tag "{name}"?
contestTags.nameHint: Alphanumeric, underscore, and hyphen only. Max 20 characters.

problems.title: Problems
problems.subtitle: Manage problems and their settings
problems.copySettingsLabel: Copy allowed languages, types, and organizations
problems.copyDataLabel: Copy test cases and data files (requires manual verification)

problemData.noTestCasesHint: Upload test cases using the form above
problemData.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this test case? This action cannot be undone.

submissions.subtitle: Review and rejudge all submissions

judgeDetail.subtitle: Judge details and configuration

languages.title: Languages
languages.subtitle: Manage programming languages
languages.createDialogDesc: Add a new programming language to the system.
languages.deleteDialogDesc: Are you sure you want to delete this language? This cannot be undone if the language has no submissions.

licenses.title: Licenses
licenses.subtitle: Manage software licenses for problems
licenses.deleteDialogDesc: Are you sure you want to delete this license? This cannot be undone if the license is used by problems.

languageLimits.title: Language-Specific Limits
languageLimits.subtitle: Manage time and memory limits per language for each problem
languageLimits.createDialogDesc: Set custom time and memory limits for a specific language on a problem.
languageLimits.editDialogDesc: Update time and memory limits for this language.
languageLimits.deleteDialogDesc: Are you sure you want to delete this language limit? The problem will fall back to default limits for this language.
languageLimits.selectBothError: Please select both problem and language
languageLimits.loadDetailFailed: Failed to load language limit details

taxonomy.title: Problem Taxonomy
taxonomy.subtitle: Manage problem groups and types
taxonomy.deleteGroupDesc: Are you sure you want to delete this problem group? This cannot be undone if the group is used by problems.
taxonomy.deleteTypeDesc: Are you sure you want to delete this problem type? This cannot be undone.

blogPosts.title: Blog Posts
blogPosts.subtitle: Manage blog posts and announcements
blogPosts.deleteDialogDesc: Are you sure you want to delete this blog post? This action cannot be undone.
